{{Quote|The gods cursed him at birth, every breath he drew was borrowed.|Vua Rapuung|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />}}
'''Qe'u''' was a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] sent to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Invasion of Yavin 4|conquered]] the small [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. When [[Vua Rapuung]] faked his death and disappeared, Qe'u was given his trawling duties and his [[vangaak]]. When Vua suddenly reappeared and found Qe'u, he killed the Shamed One to prevent him from telling anyone about [[Anakin Solo]]. As far as Rapuung was concerned, a broken neck killed Qe'u.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />
